There is no longer a distinction between blue and yellow codes. The following content is for record only and can be ignored.

translations.**因信用卡刷卡買機票會送旅遊保險，因此建議個人分開來買機票，並要查一下銀行信用: **Since purchasing plane tickets with a credit card includes travel insurance, it is recommended to buy tickets separately for each person and check the insurance coverage of your bank's credit card, as some debit cards may not have this benefit.**
translations.**因密碼規則可能不是平常自己習慣的密碼；因此請牢記，或另外寫下來，避免在日本入: **Since the password rules might differ from your usual ones, please remember it well or write it down to avoid being locked out when entering Japan.**
translations.**填寫完基本資料後，一路選擇「否」到最後完成登錄:**\n\n: **After filling in the basic information, keep selecting "No" until the registration is complete:**

translations.**體力好可以選擇小小健行登山：**\n\n: **If you have good stamina, you can choose a short hike or mountain climb:**

translations.- Connect to the internet and log in to:
- Connect to the internet and log in to the website

- Step 1, immigration inspection, find "Immigration Inspection Preparation" and select "Show QR Code"
translations.- Only some airlines are eligible. For d:
- Only some airlines are eligible. For details, please refer to the [official website](https://web.taoyuan-airport.com/ITCI/mobile/index.html){:target="_blank"}

- Check-in and baggage drop-off must be completed at least 3 hours before the flight departure on the same day.
translations.- Scroll down to the bottom of the webpa: - Scroll down to the bottom of the webpage and find "Show QR Code"
translations.- Show your passport and QR code to the: - Show your passport and QR code to the immigration officer (yellow code).
translations.- Step 2: After collecting your luggage: - Step 2: After collecting your luggage and clearing customs, click on the "Customs Declaration QR Code" (blue code)
translations.- The city is clean and has a strong sen:
- The city is clean and has a strong sense of uniformity (e.g., all entrances look the same; either all units have shoe cabinets or none do).

- No one eats while walking; everyone finishes eating in front of the store before leaving.

- Trash must be taken back to the hotel, as there are very few trash bins on the streets. It is most convenient to return trash to the store entrance after eating.

- Stores only accept their own trash.

- English was basically not understood, so we had to use very simple words and gestures or communicate via translation; however, drugstores and large shopping centers usually had Chinese-speaking staff.

- When buying tickets, receiving receipts, giving change, or handing over money, remember to place or take them directly from the tray without touching the staff.

- Avoid physical contact and staying too close.

- Public transportation is generally very quiet, especially on buses.

- **Try to avoid taking photos directly of people or capturing faces. When uploading to social media, faces should be pixelated.**

- When photographing temples, shoot at an angle, not straight on.

- Emphasize detailed SOPs, and also feel that blending into Japan is not easy.

- Japanese people generally dress formally or at least stylishly, and women are usually very well-groomed.
translations.- Trains and buses have higher coverage:
- Trains and buses have wider coverage and are more convenient than in Taiwan; during the entire trip, I only took a taxi to the hotel on the first day.

- Although transportation is convenient, Japan is large, so you need to walk a lot most of the time—almost 20,000 steps daily.

- The side to stand on varies; in Kyoto, stand on the left, but in Osaka, stand on the right.

- Buses wait for passengers to sit down before departing and wait for you to stand up and get off slowly; therefore, there is no need to move around before the stop, as Japanese people dislike that behavior.

- Hotel bathrooms are very clean and comfortable; even the smallest rooms have bathtubs.

- Almost all toilets are bidet toilets, and in department stores, there is even background water sound (to prevent awkwardness).
translations.- You can keep the SIM card (including t:
- You can keep the SIM card (including the SIM ejector tool) with you and switch to the Japanese SIM card on the plane after a safe landing.

- Remember to enable roaming after the change, then restart your device.

- All-you-can-eat plans in Japan may not truly be unlimited; speeds may be reduced after a certain data limit. Please check with the seller for details. It is recommended to use Wi-Fi when sending or watching videos.

translations.> **Since purchasing plane tickets with: > **Since buying plane tickets with a credit card includes travel insurance, it is recommended to purchase tickets separately for each person and verify your bank credit card's insurance coverage, as some debit cards may lack this benefit.**
translations.> Actually, I really want to tell the pe: > Actually, I really want to tell the people in line that if you open the webpage and click to get your e-ticket, you can go straight to check-in and then exit.
translations.> Actually, I went to Tokyo again from 6: > Actually, I went to Tokyo again from 6/7 to 6/11 😝 Travelogue Part 2 coming soon.
translations.> Also, don't comment on others. At Univ: > Also, don't comment on others. At Universal Studios, we encountered a group from Taiwan (they had a 🇹🇼 sticker on their bags) who seemed to be on a company trip for a direct sales company. They were loudly shouting slogans and filming, like "Shout super awesome, sales going up," or something like that. Since it was already crowded, they stood in the middle of the path shouting slogans. When the filming didn't go well, they kept repeating the shots and chants, which was quite embarrassing.
translations.> However, to top up, you must use a Mas: > However, to top up, you must use a MasterCard credit card; I failed to top up with a Visa card. **It is strongly recommended to complete the top-up in Taiwan beforehand. Otherwise, if you find out in Japan that you can't top up and don't receive the SMS verification code, it means you cannot use the service at all.**
translations.> Originally planned to take the train t: > Originally planned to take the train to Kansai Airport, but it would be inconvenient carrying luggage up and down. The day before, we specifically checked the bus routes (including times and stops). Early in the morning, we went to the bus station to see if there were many people. Fortunately, the line was short, so we bought bus tickets to Kansai Airport and comfortably took the bus directly to the airport.
translations.> Popular attractions and theme parks in: > Popular attractions and theme parks in Japan really require advance booking Orz. This time we missed out on baseball tickets; there were none left at the venue, so we could only enjoy a day at the stadium.

translations.iPhone 可以直接去「錢包與 Apple Pay」->「加入卡片」->「交通: On iPhone, you can go directly to "Wallet & Apple Pay" -> "Add Card" -> "Transit Card" -> "Japan" -> "Suica" -> and activate the virtual Suica.
translations.テング酒場 曽根崎 お初天神通り店，五串烤雞肉 日幣385…比台灣便宜啊！\n\: Tengu Sakaba Sonezaki Ohatsu Tenjin Street Branch, five skewers of grilled chicken for 385 yen... cheaper than in Taiwan!
translations.一出車站就看到標誌性的京都塔\n\n: Right outside the station, you can see the iconic Kyoto Tower.
translations.一早臨時起意決定去甲子園看阪神虎棒球比賽，搭乘地鐵到甲子園站。\n\n: Early in the morning, we spontaneously decided to go to Koshien to watch the Hanshin Tigers baseball game and took the subway to Koshien Station.
translations.一早起床先下樓打包早餐回房間吃：\n\n: Got up early and went downstairs to pack breakfast to eat in the room:
translations.一早起床搭電車去神戶。\n\n: Woke up early and took the train to Kobe.
translations.一樣去超商買個宵夜泡麵回飯店吃。\n\n: Went to a convenience store to buy some instant noodles for a late-night snack back at the hotel.
translations.一樣因為訂的時間太晚，選擇不多；我們選擇距離車站較近但價格較高的另一個連鎖飯店體: Due to late booking, options were limited; we chose another chain hotel, APA, which is closer to the station but more expensive. It didn’t include breakfast, but offered facilities like a swimming pool and public bathhouse.
translations.一路又走回道頓堀一代，往後走到唐吉訶德本店。\n\n: Walked back to the Dotonbori area, then continued on to the main Don Quijote store.
translations.一路步行前往清水寺\n\n: Walk all the way to Kiyomizu-dera Temple
translations.下午時分安全抵達台灣，回家休息！🇹🇼\n\n: Arrived safely in Taiwan in the afternoon, heading home to rest! 🇹🇼
translations.下山吃冰，準備打道回府\n\n: Descend the mountain to eat ice cream, then get ready to head home
translations.下山後往回走，路上邊吃了午餐天婦羅蕎麥麵：\n\n: After descending the mountain, we headed back and had tempura soba for lunch along the way:
translations.下拉到網頁底部找到「顯示 QR 碼」\n: Scroll down to the bottom of the webpage and find "Show QR Code"
translations.下車後大約走個 15 分鐘即可抵達金閣寺：\n\n: After getting off, it takes about a 15-minute walk to reach Kinkaku-ji:
translations.不得不讚嘆這個場景設計，完全把遊戲世界搬到現實，猶如來到世外桃源！！\n\n: I have to praise this scene design; it completely brings the game world to life, like stepping into a paradise!!
translations.不知道是不是因為預辦登機的關係，候機時地勤有廣播唱名我們去確認人有到，有要登機。: Not sure if it was because of the online check-in, but while waiting at the gate, the ground staff made an announcement calling our names to confirm our presence for boarding.
translations.中午沒什麼人的機場\n\n: Airport with few people at noon
translations.中午的飛機，一早 7 點就 checkout 準備去關西機場了。\n\n: The flight is at noon, so we checked out early at 7 AM to head to Kansai Airport.
translations.中途找了家店喝了冰抹茶跟吃黑糖糰子：\n\n: Stopped by a shop midway to have iced matcha and brown sugar dumplings:
translations.主要是用 [Agoda](https://www.agoda.com){:tar: Mainly used [Agoda](https://www.agoda.com){:target="_blank"} to find accommodations close to train and subway stations.
translations.之前只去過 2019 🇲🇾 Sabah 跟 2018 🇹🇭 Bangkok 兩個: Previously, I have only been to two Southeast Asian countries: Sabah, Malaysia in 2019 and Bangkok, Thailand in 2018, both on group tours.
translations.京都的街頭乾淨到可怕，就連路邊水泥墩都不會出現髒髒黑黑的狀況。\n\n: The streets of Kyoto are eerily clean, with even the concrete blocks by the roadside never appearing dirty or blackened.
translations.人真的很多，拍照要找好角度🥵\n\n: There were really many people, so you had to find a good angle to take photos 🥵
translations.今天開始大阪也變天了，開始陰天下雨，正好符合告別的心情。\n\n: Starting today, the weather in Osaka has changed to cloudy and rainy, fitting perfectly with the farewell mood.
translations.但我們吃了個閉門羹，不像台灣球賽都一定有位子，阪神的比賽賣到 7 月都全部售罄；: But we were turned away; unlike in Taiwan where there are always seats for games, Hanshin's matches were sold out through July. You have to buy tickets early, or else you can only hang out outside the stadium for the day.
translations.但要使用 Master Card 的信用卡進行儲值，我用 Visa 卡都儲值失敗: However, to top up, you must use a MasterCard credit card; I failed to top up with a Visa card. **It is strongly recommended to complete the top-up in Taiwan beforehand. Otherwise, if you find out in Japan that you can't top up and don't receive the SMS verification code, it means you cannot use the service at all.**
translations.但還好有玩，後來看新聞，這個設施 6 月開始要重新整理，大概會停個幾年。\n\n: Fortunately, we got to visit. Later, I saw in the news that this facility will undergo renovation starting in June and will likely be closed for a few years.
translations.倒數最後一天回台灣了，純走馬看花行程。\n\n: The last day before returning to Taiwan was a quick sightseeing tour.
translations.候機，回台灣囉。\n\n: Waiting at the airport, heading back to Taiwan.
translations.先去哈利波特主題區晃晃：\n\n: First, take a stroll around the Harry Potter-themed area:
translations.先去逛神戶商店街\n\n: First, visit the Kobe shopping street.
translations.入園人數非常多，一入園就趕快在 App 抽看看超級瑪利歐世界門票；還好有大神 [: The park was very crowded. Upon entering, we quickly tried the app lottery for Super Mario World tickets; luckily, thanks to the expert [黃馨平](https://medium.com/u/eac9088ed800){:target="_blank"}, we won the 5 PM entry slot for Mario World.
translations.入境天數包含到達到離開，一共 8 天。\n\n: The entry days include both arrival and departure, totaling 8 days.
translations.公共運輸上普遍很安靜，尤其公車\n: Public transportation is generally very quiet, especially on buses.
translations.公車會等人坐好才開、下車會等你起身慢慢下車；所以不需要在還沒到站就開始騷動，日本: Buses wait for passengers to be seated before departing and wait for you to stand up and get off slowly; therefore, there is no need to start moving around before the stop, as Japanese people dislike that behavior.
translations.其他景點、寺廟、旅程，隨性。\n\n: Other attractions, temples, and trips were spontaneous.
translations.其實很想跟排隊的人說，你現在網頁打開點一點領好電子機票，就能去排托運然後出境了。: Actually, I really want to tell the people in line that if you open the webpage and click to get your e-ticket, you can go straight to check-in and then exit.
translations.其實我 6/7–11 就又跑去東京了 😝 遊記下集待續\n\n: Actually, I went to Tokyo again from 6/7 to 6/11 😝 Travelogue Part 2 coming soon.
translations.其實沒買什麼東西，就是看到什麼買什麼；藥妝最後比較下來發現京都車站出來的藥妝店最: Actually, I didn't buy much; I just bought whatever caught my eye. Comparing drugstores, the ones near Kyoto Station were the cheapest (about 100-300 yen cheaper than Osaka). Among them, Don Quijote was the most expensive.
translations.再看一眼最後的大阪夜景。\n\n: One last look at the night view of Osaka.
translations.再走回程，一路逛逛神戶街道\n\n: On the way back, stroll along the streets of Kobe.
translations.再轉搭計程車到飯店(因為有行李箱就不搭公車了，不然有公車會到)；加上飛機延誤，第: Then took a taxi to the hotel (didn't take the bus because of the luggage, although there is a bus available); plus the flight delay, we arrived at the hotel after 9 PM on the first day.
translations.出境後，關西機場整修中，沒什麼吃的跟店家，最後又買了新世界的豬排咖哩吐司。\n\: After passing through immigration, Kansai Airport was under renovation, with few food options and shops available. In the end, I bought a pork cutlet curry toast from Shinsekai.
translations.出站就是甲子園棒球場。\n\n: Exit leads directly to Koshien Baseball Stadium.
translations.出關西機場後我們就直接搭 `JR關空特急HARUKA` 到 `京都車站` ，大約: After leaving Kansai Airport, we took the `JR Kansai Airport Limited Express HARUKA` directly to `Kyoto Station`. It took about 1.5 hours with only a few stops along the way.
translations.初期意外的歡樂有趣，直至今日腦中還有那個旋律！\n\n: The unexpected joy and fun in the beginning still lingers in my mind with that melody to this day!
translations.剛到機場被櫃檯排隊人群嚇到，落落長。\n\n: Just arrived at the airport and was shocked by the long queue at the counter.
translations.參拜結束下山走回八坂神社，路上隨便吃了個蓋飯跟跟風買杯%咖啡\n\n: After finishing the shrine visit, we walked back down to Yasaka Shrine. Along the way, we casually had a rice bowl and followed the trend by buying a cup of % Coffee.
translations.另外也不要說別人怎樣，我們在環球影城就遇到台灣(他貼🇹🇼在包包上)類似直銷公司的: Also, don't comment on others. At Universal Studios, we encountered a group from Taiwan (they had a 🇹🇼 sticker on their bags) who seemed to be on a company trip for a direct sales company. They were loudly shouting slogans and filming, like "Shout super awesome, sales going up," or something like that. Since it was already crowded, they stood in the middle of the path shouting slogans. When the filming didn't go well, they kept repeating the shots and chants, which was quite embarrassing.
translations.另外也可以自己加保旅遊險（醫療、不便、遺失、意外…）這次保 8 天大概 $1,5: You can also purchase travel insurance yourself (medical, inconvenience, loss, accidents, etc.). This time, an 8-day coverage cost about $1,500.
translations.另外就是容錯性很低，例如 Bug、意外出現其他語言；對我們來說可能覺得一兩次還好: Another point is the low tolerance for errors, such as bugs or unexpected appearances of other languages. For us, one or two times might be acceptable or at least not frequent; for them, I think even one occurrence could be a deal-breaker because the product is not rigorous enough or doesn't show enough respect for them.
translations.只有部分航空公司可以，詳情請參考 [官方網站](https://web.taoy: Only some airlines are eligible. For details, please refer to the [official website](https://web.taoyuan-airport.com/ITCI/mobile/index.html){:target="_blank"}
translations.可以把 SIM 卡(含 SIM 卡針)放隨身，飛機安全著陸後在機上就能換成日本: You can keep the SIM card (including the SIM ejector tool) with you and switch to the Japanese SIM card on the plane after a safe landing.
translations.可以體驗坐船看看河景(類似小碧潭？)\n\n: You can experience a boat ride to see the river view (similar to Xiaobitan?).
translations.可以鳥望萬里無緣的京都，樓下有酒吧；本來想說先下去休息一下，晚上再上來看夜景，但: You can get a bird’s-eye view of Kyoto, but there’s a bar downstairs. We originally planned to rest there first and come back up at night to see the night view. However, after eating and returning, we found out re-entry was not allowed and we had to buy tickets again, so we gave up.
translations.可能去錯店家，覺得很普。\n\n: Might have gone to the wrong store, felt quite ordinary.
translations.吃個林東芳牛肉麵等飛機\n\n: Eating at Lin Dong Fang Beef Noodles while waiting for the flight
translations.吃完不免俗要去便利店 LAWSON 買宵夜回飯店繼續吃：\n\n: After eating, it's customary to go to the convenience store LAWSON to buy some late-night snacks to continue eating back at the hotel:
translations.吃完直接走到對面搭車到嵐山\n\n: After eating, go straight across to catch the train to Arashiyama.
translations.吃完開始觀光客行程，拍拍景點、去藥妝店買東西。\n\n: After eating, we started the tourist itinerary, taking photos at attractions and shopping at drugstores.
translations.吃的部分除了有名的零食之外，我比較多找百年老店的地產，不保證好吃但保證百年；大家: For food, besides the famous snacks, I focused more on local century-old shops. I can't guarantee they taste great, but they have a hundred years of history. The popular snacks are guaranteed delicious, but you have to queue and they’re not century-old XD.
translations.吃飽後在車站附近亂逛\n\n: After eating, wandered around near the station.
translations.吃飽後往另一個方向前往「大本山天龍寺」：\n\n: After eating, head in another direction to "Tenryu-ji Temple":
translations.吃飽飯搭公車前往八坂神社：\n\n: After eating, take the bus to Yasaka Shrine:
translations.吃麥當勞早餐(比台灣便宜 $15 塊)\n\n: Eating McDonald's breakfast (15 TWD cheaper than in Taiwan)
translations.咖哩飯，吃完有點太 Heavy 還是習慣西式或台式的早餐。\n\n: Curry rice felt a bit too heavy after eating, so I still prefer Western or Taiwanese-style breakfast.
translations.唯一本店有摩天輪\n\n: The only store with a Ferris wheel
translations.單純來找小點買韓國文創小物，後來發現台灣也有賣 -_-\n\n: Just came to Xiaodian to buy Korean cultural goods, but later found out they are also sold in Taiwan -_-
translations.嚐嚐有名的神戶牛可樂餅\n\n: Try the famous Kobe beef croquette
translations.四條大宮就是起站，直接搭到底站嵐山，非常方便而且一定有位子。\n\n: Shijo-Omiya is the starting station, and you can take the train directly to the final stop, Arashiyama. It's very convenient and you will definitely have a seat.
translations.回來台灣 [看 IG 才發現拍錯了](https://www.instagram: Back in Taiwan, [only saw on IG that I took the wrong shot](https://www.instagram.com/p/CrSgDNDvUYH/){:target="_blank"} XD. Entering from the side department store offers a better viewpoint.
translations.回四條大宮去飯店領行李準備前往大阪：\n\n: Return to Shijo Omiya to pick up luggage at the hotel and prepare to head to Osaka:
translations.回程公車站擠了很多人，腳勤的朋友可以跟我們一樣走到下一個街口搭其他路線公車避開人: The bus stop for the return trip was very crowded. Friends who prefer walking can do as we did: walk to the next intersection and take another bus route to avoid the crowd and head to Kyoto Tower.
translations.回飯店繼續吃泡麵喝清酒當宵夜。\n\n: Back at the hotel, we continued eating instant noodles and drinking sake as a late-night snack.
translations.因為一切都很隨性，只安排要去大阪環球，因此先從網路買門票；因為時間太靠近了，什麼: Since everything was spontaneous and we only planned to visit Universal Studios Japan in Osaka, we first bought tickets online; however, because it was so close to the date, everything was sold out except for regular admission tickets.
translations.因為接近閉園時間，就沒有買手錶玩互動場景，只去排了耀西的設施。\n\n: Since it was close to closing time, we didn't buy the watch to play the interactive scenes and only queued for Yoshi's attraction.
translations.因為是中午的飛機，早上慢慢出門，9 點到機捷 A1 台北車站辦理預辦登機：\n\: Since the flight was at noon, we left slowly in the morning and arrived at Taoyuan Airport MRT A1 Taipei Main Station at 9 AM to complete the early check-in:
translations.因訂的時間太晚，只剩四條大宮的東橫 INN 還有空房；距離京都車站比較遠，大約: Since the booking was made too late, only Toyoko INN Shijo Omiya had available rooms; it is farther from Kyoto Station, about 3 kilometers away:
translations.因降落延後導致起飛也跟著延誤了一個多小時\n\n: The departure was delayed by over an hour due to a late landing.
translations.圖片僅共示意\n\n: The image is for illustration purposes only
translations.在神戶找了家咖啡廳休息一下：\n\n: Found a café in Kobe to take a break:
translations.在自助出關審查機器上，掃描完護照及此 QR 碼，確認完畢即可完成出關入境。\n\: At the self-service immigration machine, scan your passport and this QR code. Once confirmed, you can complete the immigration process.
translations.在鶴橋走了一大圈，這邊應該是非觀光區，遊客很少；蠻多韓國周邊商店，比較像日本人的: After walking around Tsuruhashi for a while, this area seems to be non-touristy with few visitors; there are many Korean-themed shops, making it more like a Korean town for Japanese locals.
translations.垃圾只能帶回飯店，路邊很少垃圾桶，因此在門口吃完把垃圾還給店家最方便\n: Trash can only be taken back to the hotel, as there are very few trash bins on the streets. Therefore, it's most convenient to return the trash to the store after eating at the entrance.
translations.大阪任天堂，就在車站旁邊的大丸百貨樓上。\n\n: Nintendo Osaka is located upstairs in the Daimaru Department Store right next to the station.
translations.大阪初來乍到覺得好容易迷路，出口很多，大阪、梅田其實只的都是同個地點。\n\n: At first arrival in Osaka, it felt easy to get lost because there are many exits. Actually, Osaka and Umeda refer to the same area.
translations.太早出門＋預辦登機，出境後還有快 3 小時才起飛。\n\n: Left home too early + checked in online, still nearly 3 hours until departure after immigration.
translations.太陽很大，人很多\n\n: The sun is strong, and there are many people.
translations.好像是去年開始行李托運改成計件＋計重，每人限一件 & 23kg 內；其他都要加錢: It seems that since last year, luggage check-in has changed to a piece-and-weight system: one piece per person up to 23kg; extra fees apply for anything beyond that.
translations.如果不能用 iPhone Sucia 或是 Android；目前日本實體 Suc: If you cannot use iPhone Suica or Android; currently, physical Suica cards in Japan are out of stock. You can only buy the 28-day Welcome Suica limited card, which can be loaded and used, **but it will expire after the period and is non-refundable**.
translations.如果是從捷運走過來，記得不要直接下手扶梯到底進機捷，預辦登機在機捷外面。\n\n: If you come from the MRT, remember not to go straight down the escalator into the Airport MRT. The check-in counter is outside the Airport MRT area.
translations.將護照與 QR 碼給簽證官即可 (黃碼)\n: Show your passport and QR code to the immigration officer (yellow code).
translations.尤其是哈利波特主題區，原本魔杖互動的場景都排的很長，閉園前去都沒人，看到一個姊姊: Especially in the Harry Potter-themed area, the wand interaction spots usually had long lines, but near closing time, there was no one. I saw a girl enjoying all the interactive scenes by herself XD
translations.市容整潔且一體性很強 (e.g. 門口都長一樣，不會出現有幾戶有鞋櫃有幾戶沒有，: The city is clean and has a strong sense of uniformity (e.g., all entrances look the same; there are no cases where some units have shoe cabinets and others do not—either all have them or none do).
translations.店家只收自己店家的垃圾\n: The store only accepts its own trash.
translations.建議去售票機買票才會一定有座位。\n\n: It is recommended to buy tickets at the vending machine to guarantee a seat.
translations.很喜歡東南亞萬里無雲的藍空和不受拘束的放縱\n\n: I really enjoy the clear blue skies and the carefree indulgence of Southeast Asia.
translations.後先往嵐山方向走：\n\n: Head towards the Arashiyama area first:
translations.從八坂神社往上走到清水寺大約要 1–2 公里多，不過就當看街道風景吧！\n\n: Walking from Yasaka Shrine up to Kiyomizu-dera is about 1–2 kilometers, so just enjoy the street scenery along the way!
translations.從商店街一路走到神戶港\n\n: Walk from the shopping street all the way to Kobe Port
translations.從大阪梅田車站出來走路大約 15 分鐘會到：\n\n: About a 15-minute walk from Osaka Umeda Station will get you to:
translations.從天龍寺後門出來直接去竹林：\n\n: Exit from the back gate of Tenryu-ji Temple and go straight to the bamboo grove:
translations.從神戶去道頓堀一代\n\n: From Kobe to the Dotonbori area
translations.我一直以為他叫「咖啡所」\n\n: I always thought it was called "Coffee Place"
translations.我們跑去登山看猴子跟鳥瞰景觀，從山下到山上大約要 30–45 分鐘，不難走。\n: We went hiking to see monkeys and enjoy the panoramic view. It takes about 30–45 minutes to go from the base to the top of the mountain, and it's not difficult.
translations.我是輸入第一天住宿的飯店資訊，用 Google 查英文版的飯店地址、飯店聯絡電話: I entered the hotel information for the first night's stay and used Google to find the English version of the hotel's address and contact phone number (it doesn't need to be exact, just not too far off, and the hotel name must be correct).
translations.我自己的感覺是如果要攻日本市場，如果單純靠廣告跟市場行銷應該會很困難，頂多打到一: My own feeling is that if you want to enter the Japanese market, relying solely on advertising and marketing would be very difficult, at best reaching only those who want to try something new. Japan has a strong cultural unity, so you need to find a way to blend into their lifestyle and habits to have a chance to win their hearts.
translations.房間很酷，是萬全鏡像的兩個單人間然後打通共用衛浴。\n\n: The room is cool, consisting of two single rooms mirrored perfectly and connected by a shared bathroom.
translations.承上雖然交通方便，但日本幅員遼闊，大部分時候腳要夠勤，每天都走快 20,000: Although transportation is convenient, Japan is vast, so you need to walk a lot most of the time—almost 20,000 steps daily.
translations.拍廟宇要斜拍，不能正拍\n: When photographing temples, shoot at an angle, not straight on.
translations.按照 Google Map 指示，搭電車再走路到大阪城，走路部分一路從車站到護城: Following Google Map directions, take the train and then walk to Osaka Castle. The walking part from the station to the moat and then to the main castle takes about 30 minutes, which is a bit far.
translations.排了遊樂設施，大約要排 45 分鐘；坐第一排。\n\n: The ride queue is about 45 minutes; sit in the front row.
translations.排隊引用祈求學業、戀愛、健康長壽。\n\n: Queuing to pray for academic success, love, health, and longevity.
translations.排隊買了奶油啤酒(無酒精、很甜)，覺得如果真的要收藏應該要買最貴玻璃的。\n\n: Queued up to buy Butterbeer (non-alcoholic, very sweet). If you really want a souvenir, you should buy the most expensive glass one.
translations.推薦安裝 [The Flight Tracker App](https://ap: Recommend installing [The Flight Tracker App](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/the-flight-tracker/id533365777){:target="_blank"}. Enter your flight details to track real-time flight information, including terminals, boarding gates, and baggage counters. (It also notifies of changes, but on-site information takes priority.)
translations.放完行李後出門覓食：\n\n: After dropping off our luggage, we went out to find food:
translations.旅行名稱：自訂，給自己看的\n\n: Trip Name: Custom, for personal reference
translations.日幣一定要換，大部分的寺廟門票、紀念品、御守跟部分電車(要買有座位的話)只能使用: You must exchange Japanese yen, as most temple tickets, souvenirs, omamori, and some trains (especially if you want a reserved seat) only accept cash.
translations.日本人普遍穿著很正式或至少會打扮，女生也都很精緻\n: Japanese people generally dress formally or at least stylishly, and women are usually very well-groomed.
translations.日本免稅規定是要滿 $5,000 日圓憑護照才能免稅，會用塑膠袋封起來，回國才能: Japan's tax-free rule requires a minimum purchase of ¥5,000 with a passport to qualify for tax exemption. The items will be sealed in a plastic bag and can only be opened after returning home (the photo was taken at home). Opening the bag inside Japan may lead to tax payment if caught during exit inspection, though inspections seem rare. To comply, remember that liquids must be checked in; if the sealed bag contains liquids, the whole bag must be checked in.
translations.日本熱門景點、樂園真的都要提早買 Orz ，這次敗在棒球，現場連票都沒有，只能場: Popular attractions and theme parks in Japan really require advance booking Orz. This time we missed out on baseball tickets; there were none left at the venue, so we could only enjoy a day at the stadium.
translations.日本的吃到飽不一定是真的吃到飽，超過某個流量會被降速，詳細可詢問賣家；建議要傳影: All-you-can-eat plans in Japan may not truly be unlimited; speeds may be reduced after a certain data limit. Please check with the seller for details. It is recommended to use Wi-Fi when sending or watching videos.
translations.時間很晚了，飯店東西放完就走出來到附近找吃的，選定了一家炸串店進去。\n\n: It was late, so after dropping off our stuff at the hotel, we went out nearby to find something to eat and chose a kushikatsu (fried skewer) restaurant to go in.
translations.晚上吃了居酒屋，買了日清泡麵回去當宵夜（吃來吃去還是這個好吃）\n\n: In the evening, we ate at an izakaya and bought Nissin instant noodles for a late-night snack (after trying many, this one tastes the best).
translations.晚餐去吃有名的 [大阪新世界串カツいっとく](https://www.to-ko: For dinner, we went to the famous [Osaka Shinsekai Kushikatsu Ittoku](https://www.to-kosan.com/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.最便宜一串 80 日圓起，新鮮好吃又便宜！意外的驚喜跟喜愛，第二天想再造訪就遇到: The cheapest skewer starts at 80 yen, fresh, tasty, and affordable! A pleasant surprise and favorite—on the second day, I wanted to visit again but found the shop was closed QQ
translations.最後在附近吃個東西買個阪神虎周邊、再去客多美喝個咖啡就離開了。\n\n: Finally, we grabbed a bite nearby, bought some Hanshin Tigers merchandise, had a coffee at Komeda, and then left.
translations.最後心得還是找好吃的吧！\n\n: Final thoughts: it's all about finding good food!
translations.最後拍了一下地球，再見環球。\n\n: Finally took a shot of the globe, goodbye Universal.
translations.最後拍了一張大阪大樓景觀當告別。\n\n: Finally, took a photo of the Osaka building view as a farewell.
translations.最後發現排錯櫃檯，我們已經線上點一點完成報到，可以直接去排行李托運櫃檯！直接省了: Finally, we found the troubleshooting counter. Since we had completed online check-in, we could go straight to the baggage drop-off counter! This saved us almost an hour.
translations.會有花車（馬力歐、寶可夢、芝麻街…角色）還會有舞者帶動跳，每到一個段落會停下來拉: There will be floats featuring characters like Mario, Pokémon, and Sesame Street, along with dancers leading everyone to dance. At each section, the parade stops to get everyone moving together! All staff, including those maintaining order, join in the dancing, creating a very immersive experience!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本來打算搭電車到關西機場，但要拖著行李上上下下的；前 **一天回來的時候特別探了: Originally planned to take the train to Kansai Airport, but it would be inconvenient carrying luggage up and down. The day before, we specifically checked the bus routes (including times and stops). Early in the morning, we went to the bus station to see if there were many people. Fortunately, the line was short, so we bought bus tickets to Kansai Airport and comfortably took the bus directly to the airport.
translations.東晃西晃約莫接近五點前往超級瑪利歐世界。\n\n: Wandering around, we headed to Super Nintendo World around 5 PM.
translations.東橫 INN 是東北亞通的朋友推薦的連鎖飯店體系，CP 值高也不會踩到雷，而且有: Toyoko INN is a chain hotel recommended by friends from Northeast Asia. It offers great value and is reliable, plus it includes a Japanese-style breakfast (rice balls or curry rice).
translations.每個東西都很有質感，徽章是金屬的，做工很細緻。\n\n: Everything feels high-quality; the badge is made of metal with fine craftsmanship.
translations.每個細節都做得很精緻！\n\n: Every detail is crafted with great precision!
translations.沒有人邊走邊吃，都是在店門口吃完再走\n: No one eats while walking; everyone finishes eating in front of the store before leaving.
translations.沒買到快速通關、超級瑪利歐世界，也沒有提早起床去排隊；我們走一個佛系隨性路線，1: We didn't get the Express Pass or visit Super Mario World, nor did we wake up early to line up; we took a relaxed, go-with-the-flow approach and entered the park after 10 AM.
translations.沿途還能一路欣賞最後的大阪景觀\n\n: You can enjoy the final views of Osaka along the way.
translations.消費照目前日幣幣值跟物價，其實比台灣還便宜。。。\n\n: Considering the current Japanese yen value and prices, it is actually cheaper than Taiwan...
translations.無需特別申請簽證、無需提供 COVID 疫苗/核酸證明；機票與訂房都完成後，就可: No special visa application or COVID vaccine/test proof is needed; once your flight and hotel are booked, you can fill in your entry information on Visit Japan. When you land and connect your phone to the internet, you can enter directly. Without prior application, you must fill out a paper form on the spot.
translations.然後前往市郊鶴橋找一些小店買東西。\n\n: Then head to the suburban Tsuruhashi to shop at some small stores.
translations.由下往上拍也很美。\n\n: Taking photos from bottom to top is also very beautiful.
translations.登入航空公司網站或 Email 進行線上報到，並可以直接把機票加入 Apple: Log in to the airline's website or email to check in online, and you can directly add the ticket to Apple Pay for a fully digital experience.
translations.直接失心瘋買爆薩爾達周邊：\n\n: Went on a shopping spree and bought tons of Zelda merchandise:
translations.站左站右不一定，在京都站左在大阪又變站右\n: Standing on the left or right varies; in Kyoto, stand on the left, but in Osaka, stand on the right.
translations.第一天來這的時候還覺得有點不方便，因為離京都站有距離；但後來才發現其實很讚；在金: On the first day, it felt a bit inconvenient because it was far from Kyoto Station; but later I realized it was actually great. It’s located at the center point between Kinkaku-ji and Kiyomizu-dera. Right outside, there’s a direct train to Arashiyama, and going to Osaka is also just a direct train ride away (about one hour).
translations.第一次去日本直接愛上，回來開始查下一次的日本行程。\n\n: First time in Japan and I instantly fell in love. Started planning the next trip right after returning.
translations.第一步，入境審查，找到「入境審查準備」選擇「顯示 QR 碼」\n: Step 1, immigration inspection, find "Immigration Inspection Preparation" and select "Show QR Code"
translations.第二天就沒吃飯店的早餐了，一早睡飽起來 check-out 寄放行李，出門去嵐山: On the second day, we skipped the hotel breakfast. After a good sleep, we checked out, left our luggage at the hotel, and headed out to Arashiyama.
translations.第二步，領完行李出關，點擊「海關申報 QR 碼」(藍碼)\n: Step 2: After collecting your luggage and clearing customs, click on the "Customs Declaration QR Code" (blue code)
translations.約莫下午 5:30 抵達京都塔觀景台：\n\n: Arrived at Kyoto Tower Observation Deck around 5:30 PM:
translations.網路我是直接上 KKDAY 買 8 天吃到飽的 SIM 卡約 $700；也有 E: For internet, I bought an 8-day unlimited SIM card directly from KKDAY for about $700; there is also an E-SIM version, but I prefer swapping a physical SIM card for peace of mind.
translations.總體來說，交通方便、安靜、氣侯怡人(五月去體感大約是台灣秋天天氣，晚上會涼)、人: Overall, the transportation is convenient, the environment is quiet, and the climate is pleasant (in May, it feels like autumn in Taiwan, with cool evenings). People respect personal boundaries and are polite; I really like it!
translations.英文基本上不通，只能用很簡單的跟比手畫腳；或用翻譯溝通；但藥妝店、大型購物中心基: English was basically not understood, so we could only use very simple words and gestures or communicate through translation; however, drugstores and large shopping centers generally had Chinese-speaking staff.
translations.草莓巧克力奶昔冰沙，好喝但很甜。\n\n: Strawberry chocolate milkshake smoothie, tasty but very sweet.
translations.補一張出去後從外拍的京都塔夜景。(天氣真的很好)\n\n: Add a photo taken from outside showing the night view of Kyoto Tower. (The weather was really nice)
translations.裡面每層都有戰國歷史介紹：\n\n: Each level contains an introduction to Sengoku period history:
translations.裡面的造景很真實，不說還以為在🇺🇸\n\n: The scenery inside is very realistic; you would think you're in the 🇺🇸 if not told otherwise.
Remember to check the airport [official Taoyuan Metro website](https://www.tymetro.com.tw/tymetro-new/tw/_pages/travel-guide/timetable.php){:target="_blank"} for the **express train** schedule. It’s easier to manage your actual arrival time at the airport; **make sure to take the express train**.
translations.記得換完後要去設定開漫遊，然後重開機\n: Remember to enable roaming after the change, then restart your device.
translations.詳細完工時間不確定\n\n: The exact completion time is uncertain.
translations.買票、收據、找錢、給錢要記得直接放/從盤子拿，不要接觸到店員\n: When buying tickets, receiving receipts, giving change, or handing over money, remember to place or take them directly from the tray without touching the staff.
translations.走了一大圈大阪，腳底要不行了；所幸折返回去，回大阪梅田車站時順路去逛了一下任天堂: After walking all around Osaka, my feet were about to give out; fortunately, on the way back to Osaka Umeda Station, I stopped by Nintendo for a visit.
translations.走到才發現神戶塔維修中QQ\n\n: Only realized after walking there that Kobe Tower is under maintenance QQ
translations.距離出發時間不到一個月，沒什麼好挑的了，直接上 [SkyScanner](htt: With less than a month before departure and no time to be picky, I went straight to [SkyScanner](https://www.skyscanner.com.tw){:target="_blank"} to find a flight that matched our casual pace:
translations.身為一個熱情衝動、說走就走的 ENFP，此次行程從提議到出發中間只間隔了兩週；起: As an enthusiastic and impulsive ENFP who acts on a whim, this trip was planned and started within just two weeks. The reason was that my friend [黃馨平](https://medium.com/u/eac9088ed800){:target="_blank"} happened to have a career gap and is an INFJ, a complementary personality to ENFP. I provided the passionate direction, he handled the detailed planning, and together we spontaneously decided to go.
translations.這次我換 $50,000 日幣，最後還剩 $15,000 上下。\n\n: This time I exchanged ¥50,000 and ended up with about ¥15,000 left.
translations.逛完傍晚就回大阪，在住的附近找一間居酒屋吃完最後的晚餐。\n\n: After sightseeing, return to Osaka in the evening and find an izakaya near the accommodation to have the last dinner.
translations.連上網路，登入網站\n: Connect to the internet and log in to the website
translations.遊樂場有對自己吐槽的白熊！！\n\n: The amusement park has a white bear that mocks itself!!
translations.避免肢體接觸及靠太近\n: Avoid physical contact and staying too close
translations.還有好吃的清酒冰淇淋：\n\n: There is also delicious sake ice cream:
translations.醬油炒麵普普，吃起來很膩。\n\n: Soy sauce fried noodles were just okay and felt quite greasy.
translations.重視細節 SOP，另外感覺要融入日本並不容易\n: Emphasizing detailed SOPs, and also feeling that blending into Japan is not easy.
translations.閉園前去拍了一些環球的夜景，很多本來人擠人的地方，都變很好拍了。\n\n: Before closing, I took some night shots of Universal Studios. Many places that were usually crowded became much easier to photograph.
translations.離開大阪城後在附近走了一大圈晃晃兼找吃的。\n\n: After leaving Osaka Castle, we took a long walk around the nearby area to explore and find something to eat.
translations.離開甲子園後去難波走採購逛街行程。\n\n: After leaving Koshien, we went to Namba for shopping and strolling.
translations.電車、公車比台灣覆蓋率更高更方便；去這麼多天只有第一天去飯店搭過計程車。\n: Trains and buses have higher coverage and are more convenient than in Taiwan; during the entire trip, I only took a taxi to the hotel on the first day.
translations.電車地鐵或公車都可直接使用 Sucia 西瓜卡；部分超商、購物也可以使用。\n\: You can use the Suica card directly on trains, subways, and buses; it is also accepted at some convenience stores and shops.
translations.需當日航班起飛前3小時完成登機手續、行李託運\n: Check-in and baggage drop-off must be completed at least 3 hours before the flight departure on the same day.
translations.順便補吃一下路邊的章魚燒跟蟹腳\n\n: Also grabbed some takoyaki and crab legs from a street vendor.
translations.順手買了當地產的清酒\n\n: Bought some local sake on the side
translations.類似火山歷險，最後會往下衝🥵（我很怕失重感）。\n\n: Similar to a volcano adventure, it ends with a drop downwards 🥵 (I'm very afraid of the feeling of weightlessness).
translations.飛機著陸，換好日本 SIM 卡連上網路之後就可以登入 [Vista Japan]: After the plane lands and you have swapped to a Japanese SIM card with internet access, you can log in to [Vista Japan](https://www.vjw.digital.go.jp/main/#/vjwpco001){:target="_blank"} to complete the immigration and customs procedures.
translations.飛機起飛前幾個小時還可以開啟 iOS Live Activiy 功能實時追蹤\n: You can enable the iOS Live Activity feature to track in real-time a few hours before the flight takes off.
translations.飯店外就是阪急大宮站\n\n: The hotel is right outside Hankyu Omiya Station.
translations.飯店櫃檯有一位姊姊會說中文，跟他請教了明日的行程要怎麼去比較順～很親切方便！\n: The hotel front desk has a lady who speaks Chinese. I asked her about the best way to get to tomorrow’s destinations—it was very friendly and convenient!
translations.飯店衛浴，都非常乾淨舒服；再小都有浴缸\n: Hotel bathrooms are very clean and comfortable; even the smallest rooms have bathtubs.
translations.飯店頂樓有免費的露天泳池、飯店內有超商、免費大眾湯屋。\n\n: The hotel rooftop has a free open-air swimming pool, there is a convenience store inside the hotel, and a free public bathhouse.
translations.馬桶幾乎都是免治馬桶，如果是百貨公司的還會有背景水聲(防尷尬)\n: Almost all toilets are bidet toilets, and in department stores, there is even background water sound (to prevent awkwardness).
translations.點錯，不應該點洞飯，會變成蕎麥麵＋天婦羅洞飯。\n\n: Clicked the wrong option, shouldn't have chosen "洞飯," it turned into soba noodles + tempura "洞飯."
